title: Classic Pasta Carbonara
ingredients: Spaghetti, eggs, parmesan cheese, pancetta, garlic, black pepper, salt
instructions: Boil pasta. Fry pancetta with garlic. Mix eggs and parmesan. Combine pasta with pancetta and remove from heat. Add egg mixture and mix quickly. Season with pepper.

title: Fluffy Pancakes
ingredients: Flour, milk, eggs, sugar, baking powder, butter, vanilla extract
instructions: Mix dry ingredients. Add milk, eggs, and vanilla. Cook batter in buttered pan until golden on both sides. Serve with syrup.

title: Chicken Biryani
ingredients: Basmati rice, chicken, yogurt, onion, garlic, ginger, biryani spices, saffron
instructions: Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices. Cook rice partially. Fry onions and cook chicken. Layer rice and chicken and steam together.

title: Vegan Buddha Bowl
ingredients: Quinoa, roasted chickpeas, avocado, spinach, sweet potato, tahini sauce
instructions: Cook quinoa. Roast chickpeas and sweet potatoes. Assemble bowl with veggies and drizzle tahini sauce.

title: Chocolate Lava Cake
ingredients: Dark chocolate, butter, eggs, sugar, flour, cocoa powder
instructions: Melt chocolate and butter. Mix with eggs and sugar. Add flour. Bake shortly so center stays molten.

title: Vegetable Fried Rice
ingredients: Cooked rice, carrot, peas, soy sauce, garlic, onion, sesame oil
instructions: Stir fry garlic and onion. Add vegetables. Add rice and soy sauce. Cook on high heat and mix well.
